name: mCloud Technologies Corp. 9.0% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Shares
summary: mCloud Technologies Corp. 9.0% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Shares represent a fixed-income investment in the company, providing investors with a preferred claim on dividends. mCloud Technologies Corp. provides asset management solutions combining IoT, cloud computing, and AI to optimize energy usage. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.
